category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Mongolia (MASM) conformity certification, MNS/IEC standards, and national energy programme requirements.

title.en: China-to-Mongolia Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入蒙古：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入蒙古：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Mongolia's MASM conformity certification, MNS/IEC 60335-2-24 safety standards, national energy efficiency programmes, R600a refrigerant handling, and in-country importer requirements administered by the Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与蒙古MASM合格认证、MNS/IEC 60335-2-24安全标准、国家能效计划、R600a制冷剂处理及境内进口商要求差距对照，由蒙古标准计量署管理。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與蒙古MASM合格認證、MNS/IEC 60335-2-24安全標準、國家能效計劃、R600a製冷劑處理及境內進口商要求差距對照，由蒙古標準計量署管理。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Mongolian legislation, MASM conformity certification procedures, MNS standards, energy programme thresholds, and import requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行蒙古法律、MASM合格认证程序、MNS标准、能效计划门槛值及进口要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行蒙古法律、MASM合格認證程序、MNS標準、能效計劃門檻值及進口要求。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face several Mongolia market-access points: (1) MASM (Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology) conformity certification for regulated electrical products, referencing MNS standards that adopt IEC 60335-2-24 — China's CCC/GB 4706.13 certification is not automatically recognised but the underlying IEC alignment eases re-testing; (2) energy efficiency declaration under Mongolian national energy programmes; (3) an in-country importer or local representative to clear customs (Mongolia is landlocked, served by rail/road, and is NOT an EAEU member — it operates a national regime); and (4) R600a refrigerant documentation against MNS/IEC 60335-2-24 charge requirements. A genuine advantage: Mongolia's 220/380 V 50 Hz grid matches China's 220/380 V 50 Hz nominal, so no electrical re-rating is needed.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临多个蒙古市场准入要点：（1）MASM（蒙古标准计量署）对受监管电气产品的合格认证，参照采用IEC 60335-2-24的MNS标准——中国CCC/GB 4706.13认证不被自动承认，但底层IEC对齐可减轻重新检测负担；（2）依据蒙古国家能效计划进行能效声明；（3）需境内进口商或本地代表办理清关（蒙古为内陆国，依靠铁路/公路，且非欧亚经济联盟成员——实行国家制度）；（4）R600a制冷剂须依据MNS/IEC 60335-2-24充注量要求提供文件。一项实质优势：蒙古220/380 V 50 Hz电网与中国220/380 V 50 Hz标称值一致，因此无需重新进行电气定额。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨多個蒙古市場准入要點：（1）MASM（蒙古標準計量署）對受監管電氣產品的合格認證，參照採用IEC 60335-2-24的MNS標準——中國CCC/GB 4706.13認證不被自動承認，但底層IEC對齊可減輕重新檢測負擔；（2）依據蒙古國家能效計劃進行能效聲明；（3）需境內進口商或本地代表辦理清關（蒙古為內陸國，依靠鐵路/公路，且非歐亞經濟聯盟成員——實行國家制度）；（4）R600a製冷劑須依據MNS/IEC 60335-2-24充注量要求提供文件。一項實質優勢：蒙古220/380 V 50 Hz電網與中國220/380 V 50 Hz標稱值一致，因此無需重新進行電氣定額。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or upon a MASM conformity certification or Mongolian energy programme regulatory change
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official regulator (MASM), standards body, or primary legal source preferred; local PDFs not accepted.
